title: Income in AIS Not Reported in Return
condition: AIS shows income head X with amount > 0 AND taxpayer has not included income head X in the return
failure_message: AIS shows {income_type} income of ₹{ais_amount} from {source}, but this has not been included in the return. The IT Department's system will flag this discrepancy automatically.
remediation: Review all income entries in AIS. Either include the income in the return, or file an AIS feedback disputing the entry before filing. Do not ignore AIS entries — they generate automated notices.
notes: AIS is built from third-party SFT (Statement of Financial Transactions) data. Even if the taxpayer disputes an entry, it should be addressed via AIS feedback, not silently ignored.
